channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This is the age when women’s wages tend to stop growing — and the gender pay gap gets even worse
item.description: It’s about more than just wages, as women also fall behind in wealth, career opportunities and investing confidence.

item.title: Crude-oil futures haven’t been this overbought since 1990. That doesn’t mean the rally is over.
item.description: A momentum indicator for a crude futures chart has soared to its highest level in 36 years, but as the Wall Street saying goes, overbought doesn’t mea...

item.title: Stagflation? $150 oil? Not all 401(k)s are losing money.
item.description: The problem with crises like this is that stocks and bonds can both fail.

item.title: U.S. oil prices notch record weekly gain of nearly 36%, as Middle East conflict spurs worries over production cuts
item.description: Oil prices rallied Friday to set a record weekly gain, with the Middle East starting to feel a squeeze in production and storage capacity as the Iran ...

item.title: Gold prices post worst week since January. The dollar gets part of the blame.
item.description: Gold and silver rose after weak jobs data were reported, but still finished lower for the week.

item.title: The charts are showing oil may have overextended higher, says Carter Worth
item.description: Carter Worth looks through the charts in oil after a wild week.

item.title: Market turmoil is hitting most traditional safe havens. UBS says this is the place to hide
item.description: Pharmaceutical stocks like Eli Lilly and Merck are good places to help investors ride out a recent rise in geopolitical turmoil, according to UBS.

item.title: Greg Abel makes his first big moves as Berkshire Hathaway CEO. Is it time to buy back in?
item.description: While the steps were viewed as positive signals, analysts said they are unlikely to materially alter their outlook for the shares.

item.title: The consumer stocks primed to be big winners from AI, according to Jefferies
item.description: Jefferies believes that retail companies adopting AI to increase product innovation and personalization are deepening their economic moats.

item.title: Find safety and income in these tax-exempt bonds as the Iran war stirs up the market
item.description: Rates on municipal bonds moved higher this week, which many see as an opportunity to lock in yields and stabilize portfolios.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
